summary: Sales History page improvements and SalesOrderPage credit PIN dialog fully tested. All 17 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verified: Sales History shows pagination (185 invoices), search, filter chips (All/Paid/Partial/Credit/Voided), sortable columns. SalesOrderPage credit PIN dialog appears correctly when clicking 'Save as Invoice' with product added.

issues: React key warning: duplicate keys 'retail', 'wholesale', 'special' in comparison table

backend.test_01_list_invoices_basic: PASS - /api/invoices returns invoices list with total
backend.test_03_sort_by_date_desc: PASS - invoices sorted by created_at DESC
backend.test_04_sort_by_amount_desc: PASS - invoices sorted by grand_total DESC
backend.test_05_sort_by_customer: PASS - sort by customer_name ASC works
backend.test_06_search_by_invoice_number: PASS - search param returns matching invoices
backend.test_07_filter_status_paid: PASS - status=paid returns only paid invoices
backend.test_10_filter_voided: PASS - status=voided with include_voided returns voided
backend.test_11_check_date_closed_unclosed: PASS - /api/invoices/check-date-closed returns closed=false for future dates
backend.test_13_verify_manager_pin_credit_sale: PASS - PIN verification works for credit_sale_approval action
backend.test_14_verify_manager_pin_invalid: PASS - Invalid PIN correctly returns valid=false
backend.test_17_po_update_endpoint: PASS - Purchase orders available for testing

frontend.filter_chips: PASS - filter-all, filter-paid, filter-partial, filter-open, filter-voided all found
frontend.sort_columns: PASS - sort-number, sort-customer, sort-amount, sort-date all found
frontend.credit_pin_dialog: PASS - Credit Sale Authorization dialog appears with PIN input (data-testid='credit-pin-input')

verified_features: Sales History shows ALL invoices (185 total) with pagination (25 per page)
Search by invoice number and customer name works
Filter chips (All, Paid, Partial, Credit, Voided) filter correctly
Sortable columns (Sale #, Customer, Total, Date) work
SalesOrderPage credit sale requires PIN dialog before saving
Backend /api/invoices supports search, sort_by, sort_dir, status, include_voided params
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sales History page improvements fully tested. All backend API enhancements (search, sort, filter, pagination) working. Credit PIN dialog on SalesOrderPage appears correctly when branch is selected. The dialog shows 'Credit Sale Authorization' title, Amount, Customer, PIN input field, and 'Authorize & Save' button. React key warning exists on LandingPage comparison table (duplicate keys retail/wholesale/special).
